JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP. 116.850 - GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT ANDAM, CHRISTOPHER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRISPI, ALEXANDER N. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDAM, CHRISTOPHER $1,820.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,905.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF DAMAGES TO BE $3390.06 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE, AND $1160 FOR GENERAL AND SPECIAL DAMAGES FOR BODILY INJURY. THE COURT ATTRIBUTES 60% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
